settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDescription: Select the display language for the application here.

nameGrouping.title: Randomly split names into groups
nameGrouping.description: Paste names, choose the number of groups, and generate balanced random groups.
nameGrouping.inputDescription: Enter one name per line. Empty lines are ignored automatically.
nameGrouping.resultDescription: Click “Generate” and the grouped result will appear here.
nameGrouping.namesPlaceholder:
For example:
Alice
Bob
Cindy
David
nameGrouping.groupCountHint: Names are distributed as evenly as possible.
nameGrouping.seedHint: Leave empty to reshuffle every time, or fill in a seed to reproduce the same result.
nameGrouping.dedupeHint: Keep the first occurrence of a name and remove later duplicates.
nameGrouping.emptyDescription: Enter names on the left and click “Generate” to see the randomized groups here.

validation.emptyNames: Please enter at least one name.
validation.invalidGroupCount: Please enter a valid group count.
validation.tooManyGroups: The number of groups cannot exceed the number of names.
validation.noResults: There is no grouping result to copy yet.

nameGrouping.copySuccess: The grouping result has been copied to your clipboard.
nameGrouping.resetSuccess: The random grouping tool has been reset.

randomInsert.title: Insert symbols randomly before each non-space character
randomInsert.description: Generate one or more randomized outputs by inserting symbols evenly before each non-whitespace character.
randomInsert.inputDescription: Paste the source text and list the symbols to insert, one symbol per line.
randomInsert.resultDescription: After clicking “Generate”, the processed outputs will appear here.
randomInsert.sourcePlaceholder:
For example:
Hello world
This is a test
randomInsert.countHint: Generates multiple randomized outputs at once.
randomInsert.seedHint: Leave empty for a new random result each time, or enter a seed to reproduce the same output order.
randomInsert.emptyDescription: Fill in the source text and symbols on the left, then click “Generate”.

validation.emptySymbols: Please enter at least one insert symbol.
validation.invalidCount: Please enter a valid generate count between 1 and 10000.
validation.noCharacters: The source text has no non-whitespace characters to process.
validation.noResults: There are no generated results to copy yet.

randomInsert.copySuccess: All outputs have been copied to your clipboard.
randomInsert.copySingleSuccess: This output has been copied to your clipboard.
randomInsert.resetSuccess: The random insert tool has been reset.
